presets.name: Product Decision
presets.example_question: Should we launch our new AI feature next month?

presets.name: Career Choice
presets.example_question: Should I quit my job to start my own company?

presets.name: Strategic Bet
presets.example_question: Should we expand into the European market in 2027?

presets.name: Code Review
presets.example_question: Should we rewrite our auth system from scratch, or incrementally refactor it?

presets.name: Investment
presets.example_question: Where should I invest $50k for the next 5 years?

presets.name: Wild Card
presets.example_question: Will AGI happen in the next 5 years?

presets.name: User Research
presets.example_question: Why are users churning from our SaaS after the free trial?

presets.name: Ethical Dilemma
presets.example_question: Should we use customer data to train our AI models, even with anonymization?
